name: Prassa Me Domata (Leeks Stewed with Tomatoes)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Canned tomatoes or tomato juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the stem ends and green parts of leeks, then wash thoroughly and cut into 1-inch slices.
2. Soak in hot water for 5 to 10 minutes, then drain and discard the water.
3. In a non-aluminum pan, combine the sliced leeks with the tomatoes or tomato juice, stock or broth, onion, celery, parsley, thyme or oregano, butter or oil, salt, and pepper.
4. Simmer until tender (approximately 20 minutes), adding lemon juice during the last 5 minutes.
5. Serve warm or cold.
